name: mcp-trust
description: Commercial-grade 55-substep security audit of MCP servers, AI agents, and agentic OAuth flows against the SANS/AWS 2025 agentic-AI threat taxonomy plus a Supply Chain & Dependency Security pillar. Evidence-confidence model (CONFIRMED / STRONG_SIGNAL / WEAK_SIGNAL / UNKNOWN), finding-types taxonomy (DEFECT / RISK / GAP / OBSERVATION / QUESTION), automatic-fail conditions, deployment-context modifiers, manual-validation appendix. Architectural flowchart + live substep tracker, per-substep severity rubric, weighted 0-10 trust score, top-3 risks, remediation roadmap, AWS compliance mapping. Live CVE / advisory cross-reference (NVD, MITRE, GitHub Advisory DB + GraphQL, OSV.dev, deps.dev, CISA KEV JSON/CSV, Exploit-DB, CERT/CC, Snyk, OpenCVE, CVEdetails, Sonatype, AquaSec AVD, Trivy DB, Socket.dev, OSSF Scorecard, AttackerKB, Project Zero, JFrog, Tenable, Wiz, MSRC, HackerOne, Bugcrowd, Hacker News, Bleeping Computer, Securelist, SANS ISC, Krebs). Jurisdictional supply-chain risk screening anchored to OFAC, EU, UN, and US BIS sanctions frameworks plus NIST SP 800-161 and EO 14028.
